payload.answer: The proposal should not be accepted as a single conversation_summary memory card because it appears to bundle an entire 8000-word transcript into one record, which is too broad and risks overcommitting detail. Consider breaking it into smaller, scoped summaries or storing only durable, high-signal facts.
citations: LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript
repair_options: Split the transcript into smaller conversation_summary cards by topic or time segment.
Extract only durable, high-signal facts and omit ephemeral dialogue details.
Store the transcript-derived points as separate additive memory candidates instead of one merged summary.
Ask the user which parts of the transcript are important to keep as memory.
Keep the proposal uncommitted until it is reduced to concise, durable content.
